TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == khu' == 'twan sa pinbahuw pinbahuw hya ga nanu yaqu pagay ru trakis ru bsinuw ru ixiy. khu' hya ga trkon nha kin wagiq nya ru syan nha zyulu' qehut nha qoli'. skwan ta' pinbahuw qu khu' hiya'. mha ni ki'an ngyaw qu khu' lga, mngnugu' mwah mquriq maniq trakis snku' ta' qu qoli' la.
S.PHON: == kħuʔ == ʔtwan s~ɕa pinβaħuw pinβaħuw ħja ɣa nanu jaqu paɣaj ru trakis~ɕ ru βs~ɕinuw ru ixij. kħuʔ ħja ɣa trkon nħa kin waɣiq nja ru s~ɕjan nħa zjuluʔ qeħut nħa qoliʔ. s~ɕkwan taʔ pinβaħuw qu kħuʔ ħijaʔ. mħa ni kiʔan ŋjaw qu kħuʔ lɣa, mŋnuɣuʔ mwaħ mquriq maniq trakis~ɕ s~ɕnkuʔ taʔ qu qoliʔ la.
S.FORM: == khu' == 'twan sa pinbahuw pinbahuw hya ga nanu yaqu pagay ru trakis ru bsinuw ru ixiy. khu' hya ga trkon nha kin wagiq nya ru syan nha zyulu' qehut nha qoli'. skwan ta' pinbahuw qu khu' hiya'. mha ni ki'an ngyaw qu khu' lga, mngnugu' mwah mquriq maniq trakis snku' ta' qu qoli' la.
S.PHON: == kħuʔ == ʔtwan s~ɕa pinβaħuw pinβaħuw ħja ɣa nanu jaqu paɣaj ru trakis~ɕ ru βs~ɕinuw ru ixij. kħuʔ ħja ɣa trkon nħa kin waɣiq nja ru s~ɕjan nħa zjuluʔ qeħut nħa qoliʔ. s~ɕkwan taʔ pinβaħuw qu kħuʔ ħijaʔ. mħa ni kiʔan ŋjaw qu kħuʔ lɣa, mŋnuɣuʔ mwaħ mquriq maniq trakis~ɕ s~ɕnkuʔ taʔ qu qoliʔ la.
